name: copilot-prompt-optimizer
description: An intelligent prompt optimizer for VS Code Copilot Chat, enhancing user intent with codebase context and best practices.

chatParticipants.name: optimizer
chatParticipants.description: Optimize your prompt with codebase context before asking Copilot

commands.name: data-program
commands.description: Generate a multi-stack optimization plan for SQL, Python, React, and Java

copilotPromptOptimizer.defaultTemplate.description: The default persona/template to use for prompt optimization.

copilotPromptOptimizer.includeContext.description: Automatically include active editor context and selections.

copilotPromptOptimizer.dataProgram.monit.description: Enable monitoring and evaluation checkpoints in generated optimization plans.

copilotPromptOptimizer.dataProgram.defau.description: Default technology stacks included in a multi-stack optimization analysis.

copilotPromptOptimizer.sql.maxIndexSugge.description: Maximum number of SQL index recommendations to surface.

copilotPromptOptimizer.sql.analyzeExecut.description: Include execution plan analysis guidance for SQL workloads.

copilotPromptOptimizer.python.memoryBudg.description: Target Python memory budget used for optimization recommendations.

copilotPromptOptimizer.python.enablePara.description: Recommend multiprocessing, vectorization, or distributed execution for Python tasks when relevant.

copilotPromptOptimizer.react.stateStrate.description: Preferred React state management strategy for data-heavy views.

copilotPromptOptimizer.react.virtualizat.description: Row threshold after which virtualization should be recommended.

copilotPromptOptimizer.java.threadPoolSi.description: Preferred Java worker thread pool size for server-side data processing recommendations.

copilotPromptOptimizer.java.cacheStrateg.description: Preferred cache strategy for Java data services.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
